acquisition method: we sought to estimate the concentration of endogenous PKD1 in HEK239T cells by parallel reaction monitoring (PRM) MS.
cleavage agent: After tryptic digestion, we quantified the individual PKD1-specific peptides by targeted MS.
instrument: Mass spectra were recorded on a Waters Synapt G2-Si equipped with a ZSpray ESI source.
ionization type: equipped with a ZSpray ESI source.
labeling: we quantified the individual PKD1-specific peptides by targeted MS.
